explanation: The mug is currently dirty and being held by the robot. To clean it first, I need to place it in the sinkbasin to wash it. The faucet must be turned on to allow cleaning. After washing, I will pick up the mug again to continue with the old plan. The remaining steps in the old plan (like placing it on the coffeemachine or countertop) will be executed as part of 'CONTINUE_NA'.
